chapters.name: Dallas Alumni Chapter
chapters.description: Connects alumni living in the Dallas–Fort Worth metroplex with networking, social, and service events throughout the year.
chapters.coverageDescription: Serves alumni in Dallas, Fort Worth, and surrounding North Texas communities.

chapters.name: Austin Alumni Chapter
chapters.description: Hosts meetups, lectures, and family-friendly events for alumni in the Austin area.
chapters.coverageDescription: Greater Austin, Round Rock, and Central Texas.

chapters.name: New York City Alumni Chapter
chapters.description: One of the largest regional chapters, focused on professional networking, arts, and community service.
chapters.coverageDescription: New York City’s five boroughs and nearby suburbs.

chapters.name: San Francisco Bay Area Alumni Chapter
chapters.description: Brings together alumni across the Bay Area with events in tech, entrepreneurship, and outdoor activities.
chapters.coverageDescription: San Francisco, Oakland, San Jose, and the broader Bay Area.

chapters.name: Seattle Alumni Chapter
chapters.description: Focuses on technology, sustainability, and community-building events for Pacific Northwest alumni.
chapters.coverageDescription: Seattle, Bellevue, Tacoma, and surrounding Puget Sound communities.

class_notes.title: New Role at FinEdge Analytics
class_notes.content: After five years in consulting, I recently joined FinEdge Analytics as a Product Lead focusing on data platforms.

class_notes.title: Wedding in Napa Valley
class_notes.content: Excited to share that I got married in Napa Valley this January. Looking forward to future alumni wine country meetups!

class_notes.title: Welcoming Our First Child
class_notes.content: We welcomed our daughter, Maya, in December. Mom, dad, and baby are all doing well!

class_notes.title: Planning Our 15-Year Reunion
class_notes.content: The planning committee for the Class of 2011 15-year reunion is forming. Contact me if you’d like to help organize events.

class_notes.title: Exploring a Career Change
class_notes.content: I’m considering a transition from finance to UX design and would love to connect with alumni in product and design roles.

events.title: NYC Alumni Networking Breakfast
events.description: Start your day connecting with fellow alumni in New York over coffee and light breakfast.

events.title: NYC Spring Alumni Networking Mixer
events.description: An evening mixer for alumni across industries to build professional connections.

events.title: NYC Alumni Leadership Panel
events.description: Hear from alumni executives about leading through change.

events.title: Bay Area Alumni in Tech Meetup
events.description: Casual gathering for alumni working in software and technology in the Bay Area.

events.title: Virtual Career Coaching Clinic
events.description: One-on-one virtual sessions with career coaches for resume and LinkedIn reviews.

events.title: Homecoming Weekend Tailgate
events.description: Join fellow alumni for food, music, and pre-game festivities during Homecoming Weekend.

events.title: Homecoming Weekend Family Brunch
events.description: A family-friendly brunch during Homecoming Weekend featuring remarks from the dean.

events.title: Seattle Alumni in Software Networking Night
events.description: Connect with fellow software and technology professionals in the Seattle area.

events.title: Virtual Alumni-Student Mentoring Kickoff
events.description: Launch event for the spring mentoring cohort with breakout rooms by field of study.

events.title: Boston Alumni Day of Service
events.description: Give back with alumni in the Boston area through coordinated volunteer projects.

events.title: NYC Alumni Spring Social
events.description: Informal social gathering for NYC-area alumni and their guests.

events.title: Webinar: Navigating Early Career Transitions
events.description: Career counselors share strategies for switching industries within five years of graduation.

fields_of_study.name: Computer Science
fields_of_study.description: Software engineering, data structures, algorithms, and related fields.

fields_of_study.name: Business Administration
fields_of_study.description: Management, finance, marketing, and organizational leadership.

fields_of_study.name: Mechanical Engineering
fields_of_study.description: Mechanical systems, product design, and manufacturing.

fields_of_study.name: Psychology
fields_of_study.description: Research, counseling, and applied psychology fields.

fields_of_study.name: Communications
fields_of_study.description: Public relations, media studies, and corporate communications.

funds.name: Scholarship Fund
funds.description: Provides need-based and merit scholarships for current students.

funds.name: Annual Fund
funds.description: Supports the area of greatest need across campus each year.

funds.name: Athletics Fund
funds.description: Enhances varsity and club sports programs.

funds.name: Library Innovation Fund
funds.description: Funds digital resources, technology, and collaborative spaces in the library.

industries.name: Software/Technology
industries.description: Software engineering, information technology, and related tech roles.

industries.name: Marketing & Advertising
industries.description: Brand management, digital marketing, and advertising agencies.

industries.name: Healthcare
industries.description: Hospitals, clinics, public health organizations, and healthcare technology.

industries.name: Consulting
industries.description: Management consulting and specialized advisory services.

interest_areas.name: Career Networking
interest_areas.description: Connect with alumni for professional networking and career opportunities.

interest_areas.name: Mentoring Students
interest_areas.description: Serve as a mentor to current students through formal and informal programs.

interest_areas.name: Social Events
interest_areas.description: Attend social gatherings, reunions, and meetups with fellow alumni.

interest_areas.name: Community Service
interest_areas.description: Participate in volunteer projects and service days.

interest_areas.name: Athletics & Fitness
interest_areas.description: Support or participate in alumni sports and fitness activities.

interest_areas.name: Lifelong Learning
interest_areas.description: Stay engaged through lectures, webinars, and short courses.

interest_areas.name: Arts & Culture
interest_areas.description: Attend performances, exhibits, and cultural events.

jobs.title: Remote Marketing Coordinator
jobs.description: Support digital campaigns, coordinate email marketing, and analyze basic performance metrics.
jobs.requirements: Bachelor’s degree in marketing or related field; strong writing skills; familiarity with email platforms.

jobs.title: Digital Marketing Associate (Remote)
jobs.description: Execute paid and organic digital campaigns and collaborate with content and design teams.
jobs.requirements: 0–2 years of experience in digital marketing; Google Analytics familiarity preferred.

jobs.title: Growth Marketing Assistant - Remote
jobs.description: Assist with user acquisition campaigns, landing page testing, and campaign reporting.
jobs.requirements: Interest in data-driven marketing; Excel or Google Sheets proficiency; strong communication skills.

jobs.title: Senior Digital Marketing Manager (Remote)
jobs.description: Lead the digital marketing strategy for a B2B SaaS company.
jobs.requirements: 5+ years of digital marketing experience; B2B SaaS background preferred.

jobs.title: Software Engineer
jobs.description: Develop and maintain web applications in a collaborative engineering team.
jobs.requirements: 2+ years of experience in software development; experience with JavaScript and cloud platforms.

jobs.title: Product Manager
jobs.description: Own the roadmap for a core cloud collaboration product.
jobs.requirements: 3–5 years in product management; experience working with agile engineering teams.

jobs.title: Investment Analyst
jobs.description: Support senior analysts with financial modeling and industry research.
jobs.requirements: 1–3 years in finance; strong Excel and modeling skills.

jobs.title: HR Generalist
jobs.description: Provide HR support across recruiting, onboarding, and employee relations.
jobs.requirements: 2–4 years in HR; experience in healthcare a plus.

jobs.title: Remote UX Designer
jobs.description: Design mobile and web experiences in collaboration with product and engineering.
jobs.requirements: Portfolio demonstrating user-centered design; 2+ years professional experience.

jobs.title: Data Scientist
jobs.description: Build predictive models and collaborate with business stakeholders on data initiatives.
jobs.requirements: 3+ years experience; proficiency in Python or R.

jobs.title: Marketing Intern (Remote)
jobs.description: Assist with social media and content creation for an outdoor gear brand.
jobs.requirements: Current undergraduate student; interest in marketing and outdoor recreation.

jobs.title: Customer Success Representative (Remote)
jobs.description: Serve as the primary point of contact for small business customers.
jobs.requirements: 1–2 years in customer-facing roles; strong communication skills.

mentoring_audience_options.label: Undergraduate students
mentoring_audience_options.description: Current undergraduate students seeking academic, career, or personal guidance.

mentoring_audience_options.label: Graduate students
mentoring_audience_options.description: Master’s and doctoral students pursuing advanced degrees.

mentoring_audience_options.label: New graduates (0–3 years out)
mentoring_audience_options.description: Recent alumni navigating their first years after graduation.

mentoring_audience_options.label: Alumni
mentoring_audience_options.description: Alumni at any career stage seeking peer mentoring or advice.

mentoring_audience_options.label: Prospective students
mentoring_audience_options.description: High school or transfer students exploring the college.

mentoring_topics.name: Resume review
mentoring_topics.description: Help mentees strengthen their resumes and LinkedIn profiles.

mentoring_topics.name: Technical interview prep
mentoring_topics.description: Practice coding, case, or technical interviews.

mentoring_topics.name: Career switching
mentoring_topics.description: Support for transitioning into a new field or industry.

mentoring_topics.name: Graduate school applications
mentoring_topics.description: Guidance on selecting programs and preparing applications.

mentoring_topics.name: Product management
mentoring_topics.description: Mentoring on breaking into and advancing in product roles.

mentoring_topics.name: Leadership development
mentoring_topics.description: Coaching on leading teams, projects, and organizations.

product_categories.name: Apparel

product_categories.description: Hats, scarves, tote bags, and small branded items.

product_categories.description: Mugs, tumblers, and water bottles with alumni branding.

volunteer_opportunities.title: Homecoming Weekend Welcome Tent Volunteers
volunteer_opportunities.description: Greet alumni as they arrive on campus, provide schedules, and answer questions at the main welcome tent.

volunteer_opportunities.title: Homecoming Weekend Parade Marshals
volunteer_opportunities.description: Assist with lining up floats and ensuring safety along the parade route.

volunteer_opportunities.title: Homecoming Weekend Reunion Check-In
volunteer_opportunities.description: Support reunion class check-in tables and distribute name badges.

volunteer_opportunities.title: Spring Day of Service
volunteer_opportunities.description: Join fellow alumni for a coordinated day of service projects across the city.

volunteer_opportunities.title: Virtual Resume Review Night
volunteer_opportunities.description: Provide one-on-one resume feedback to current students via video chat.

volunteer_opportunities.title: Commencement Ushers
volunteer_opportunities.description: Help welcome guests, distribute programs, and guide seating during commencement.

volunteer_opportunities.title: NYC College Fair Alumni Ambassadors
volunteer_opportunities.description: Represent the college at a regional college fair and speak with prospective students.

volunteer_opportunities.title: Seattle Alumni Mock Interview Night
volunteer_opportunities.description: Conduct mock interviews for juniors and seniors preparing for internship recruiting.

volunteer_opportunities.title: Dallas Chapter Spring Social Volunteers
volunteer_opportunities.description: Assist the Dallas Alumni Chapter with event setup, registration, and cleanup.

volunteer_opportunities.title: Alumni Library Book Drive Sorting
volunteer_opportunities.description: Help sort and pack donated books for shipment to partner schools.

volunteer_committees.description: Plans and executes social, networking, and service events for the Dallas Alumni Chapter.

volunteer_committees.name: Membership Committee
volunteer_committees.description: Recruits new members, welcomes recent graduates, and maintains engagement with local alumni.

volunteer_committees.name: Professional Networking Committee
